disclaimer: UAE corporate tax rules changed materially in 2025/2026 (MD 229/2025 updated QFZP, FTA late-registration penalty waiver in April 2025, Pillar Two DMTT effective January 2025, sweetened drinks tiered excise from January 2026). Always verify against the FTA portal before quoting figures.

qfzp.name: Qualifying Free Zone Person
qfzp.summary: Eligible free zone persons get 0% on Qualifying Income and 9% on the rest.
qfzp.saas_note: SaaS is NOT a Qualifying Activity. Most free zone SaaS revenue gets 9%, not 0%. This is critical for setup_advisor recommendations.
qfzp.de_minimis: Lower of 5% of revenue or AED 5,000,000

small_business_relief.name: Small Business Relief
small_business_relief.summary: Revenue under AED 3M qualifies for full relief through tax periods ending 31 December 2026.

registration.waiver_announcement: April 2025: penalty waived if first return is filed within 7 months of the end of the tax period.

pillar_two_dmtt.name: Domestic Minimum Top-up Tax
pillar_two_dmtt.applies_to: MNE groups with consolidated revenue at or above EUR 750 million

esr.name: Economic Substance Regulations
esr.warning: Do NOT promise ESR filing tools for current periods. The 9 Relevant Activities only matter for historical filings.

dnfbp_categories: Dealers in precious metals and stones

vara.name: Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority of Dubai
vara.applies_to: Virtual asset service providers operating in Dubai (excluding DIFC)

ubo.name: Ultimate Beneficial Owner
ubo.summary: All UAE companies must maintain a UBO register and file with their licensing authority. 25% threshold for direct or indirect ownership.
